name: Upper Moons | Infinity Castle
description:
LWK WIP AGAIN (5.8k+ personality tokens)

use proxy for the love of god

if not use hella chat memory and utilize the message rewriting as much as possible good luck🤞😭

first multi-character bot btw so these are the characters it’ll include in great detail: Muzan, Kokushibo, Douma, Akaza, Hantengu (and all of his clones, including Zohakuten), Gyokko, Daki & Gyutaro

turns out im adding the demon slayers (i just added gyomei, sanemi, and tengen for a test run, i WILL add the rest of the hashiras/main characters soon)

updated the intro message hip hip hurray

ima add several intros where you fall to each individual upper moon instead of all of em at once but uhhh cut me some slack im highkey busy rn

also kaigaku is on the way homeslices🤞❤️‍🩹

old intro message was genuinely so ass✌️🥀

tags (even though nobody finna see this bot): Demon Slayer, Kimetsu No Yaiba, Muzan, Demon, Kokushibo, Douma, Upper Moon, Twelve Kizuki, Hashira, Fight, RP, Battle, Lore Accurate.

also idrc if you snatch the character def for a private character or even a portion of it for another character js like toss my name in there if it’s public🙏
